items.title: Royalties
items.description: Royalty payouts every quarter. Minimum payout amount from ₽1,000.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.description: Answers to the questions we get most often

items.question: How can I release music on Spotify, Yandex Music, and other platforms?
items.answer: You register on our platform and upload tracks through your personal dashboard. We review them and then deliver to major streaming services like Apple Music, Spotify, YouTube Music, Yandex Music, and others. After release, you start earning from streams.

items.question: Do you distribute AI-generated music?
items.answer: Yes, we deliver AI tracks to all major platforms, including international ones.

items.question: Will my tracks be removed if I stop paying the subscription?
items.answer: No, tracks already delivered to platforms remain live and are not removed.

items.question: Which platforms do you deliver tracks to?
items.answer: We distribute to 50+ streaming platforms, including Yandex Music, VK, SberZvuk, KION, Apple Music, Spotify, TikTok, and YouTube.

items.question: Can neural-network music be monetized and earn royalties?
items.answer: Yes, in most cases AI music can be monetized if source-material rights are not violated: samples, voices, melodies, and lyrics. We help assess risks and structure your release to comply with platform rules.

items.question: How do I track streams for my tracks?
items.answer: Detailed analytics from major platforms is available in your personal dashboard.

items.question: Do you provide promotion services?
items.answer: Yes, in your dashboard you will find a dedicated section with services for comprehensive promotion.

items.question: Will my AI tracks get blocked after release?
items.answer: The risk can’t be removed completely because platform policies may change, but it can be significantly reduced. We review your materials, suggest edits to artwork, descriptions, and metadata, and work through partners that are more AI-friendly.

yandexVideoshot.title: Upload videoshot to Yandex Music
yandexVideoshot.description: We upload your ready-made videoshot to your release in Yandex Music
yandexVideoshot.serviceDescription: A Yandex Music videoshot is a looping vertical video (5-15 seconds) that improves listener engagement. We check platform requirements and upload the asset to your release.
yandexVideoshot.examplesUsageTitle: You can use as a videoshot:
examplesUsageItems: footage shot specifically for Yandex Music;
clips from your music video, backstage scenes, or motion design.

yandexVideoshotCreation.title: Yandex Music videoshot creation
yandexVideoshotCreation.description: We create a videoshot for your track and publish it to Yandex Music
yandexVideoshotCreation.serviceDescription: Our team creates a unique video sequence for your track.
examples: What we offer: edits from your existing music video or backstage footage, plus motion design and abstract graphics.

A Yandex Music videoshot is a looping vertical video (5-15 seconds, MP4, H.264, 404x720 px) that boosts listener engagement. It must be high quality, keep key objects centered, and avoid visible lip-sync movement because the audio loops independently.
Videoshots can increase likes and shares by 25-26%.
You can use footage shot specifically for Yandex Music, clips from a music video, backstage footage, or motion design.
Videoshots can be added both to already released tracks and upcoming releases.

yandexVideoavatar.title: Yandex Music video avatar creation
yandexVideoavatar.description: We prepare a video avatar for your Yandex Music artist profile
yandexVideoavatar.serviceDescription: A video avatar is a short looping background clip shown instead of a static photo in the artist card.
examples: You can upload it via BandLink support (Yandex Music).
Format requirements: you must own rights to the video; resolution 1000x1345 px; size up to 5 MB; the frame must include the artist or band members only, without unrelated people.
Avoid placing the face in the bottom third of the frame, as this area is covered by the artist name and playback controls.
There is no strict duration limit, but 5-7 seconds is recommended.
Do not include offensive or prohibited content, smoking/alcohol/drugs, explicit/violent scenes, brand/album/concert ads, text overlays, watermarks, or badges of other services.
The first frame (as an image) is displayed until the video avatar starts playing.

spotifyVideoshot.title: Spotify videoshot
spotifyVideoshot.description: We create a Spotify Canvas-style loop (3-8 seconds)
spotifyVideoshot.serviceDescription: Our team creates a unique video sequence for your track.
spotifyVideoshot.warningText: To upload videoshots to Spotify, you need access to Spotify for Artists. This is a dedicated platform for musicians to manage profiles, track stats, and engage with fans. After registration and profile verification, you can add videoshots to tracks using the Canvas feature.
examples: What we offer: edits from your existing music video or backstage footage, plus motion design and abstract graphics.

A Spotify videoshot is a looping vertical video (3-8 seconds, MP4, H.264, 404x720 px) that improves listener engagement. It should be high quality, keep key objects centered, and avoid visible lip-sync motion due to looping.
Videoshots can increase likes and shares by 25-26%. You can use clips from a music video, backstage footage, or motion design.
Videoshots can be added both to already released tracks and upcoming releases.
